actions.text: Referred to the House Committee on Agriculture.

official_title: To establish a pilot program for an expedited qualification and approval process for direct farm ownership loans, and for guaranteed farm ownership loans serviced by a Preferred Certified Lender, at the Department of Agriculture.

titles.title: To establish a pilot program for an expedited qualification and approval process for direct farm ownership loans, and for guaranteed farm ownership loans serviced by a Preferred Certified Lender, at the Department of Agriculture.

To establish a pilot program for an expedited qualification and approval process for direct farm ownership loans, and for guaranteed farm ownership loans serviced by a Preferred Certified Lender, at the Department of Agriculture.
